SYNTHETIC TENDER FIXTURE - GREY AREA CONSTRUCTION

Tender total: $990,000
GST: refer to cover email (not supplied)
Demolition allowance: 40,000
Alternate A - retain existing windows: deduct $18,500
Provisional sum - rock excavation: $25,000 plus GST

The document intentionally leaves the headline total's GST treatment ambiguous.
The system must not guess whether $990,000 includes GST or silently combine
unconfirmed totals.
